payload.text:
[CODE REVIEW REQUEST]
verification-evidence:
1) Build: npm run build in front/ passed (vite build success).
2) Resolution options present in front/components/ControlPanel.tsx with exact values:
- 1024x1024, 1024x576, 576x1024, 1024x768, 768x1024
- 1920x1088, 1088x1920
- 2048x2048, 2048x1152, 1152x2048
3) Grouped UI + active/muted logic present: resolutionGroups + activeResolutionGroup + group/button conditional styles in same file.
